ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "time_interval" INTEGER /* Time interval for the data point (in seconds) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed during the time interval */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the node reporting the data */,
  "root_node_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the root node in the hierarchy */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_upload table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES data_uploads ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_root_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("root_node_id") REFERENCES root_nodes ("root_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., facility, substation) */,
  "parent_node_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent node (if applicable) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the node location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the node location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_nodes" (
  "root_node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root node */,
  "root_node_name" TEXT /* Name of the root node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the root node */,
  "geo_area" TEXT /* Geographic area represented by the root node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("root_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the node associated with the summary */,
  "root_node_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the root node associated with the summary */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy consumed over the time period */,
  "average_energy" REAL /* Average energy consumed per time interval */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the summary (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the time period */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_summary_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_summary_root_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("root_node_id") REFERENCES root_nodes ("root_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that triggered the notification */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "message" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions (e.g., view_report, upload_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., meter, sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor providing the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which data was uploaded */,
  "upload_timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp when the data was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "upload_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded data (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" REAL /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the report_templates table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report associated with the template */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report template (e.g., HTML, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access (e.g., view report, upload data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_detection" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node where the anomaly occurred */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., spike, dip) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, neural network) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
